message:
🐛 Don't show fix_ready for draft PRs - keep as AI Working

Draft PRs (WIP) should show as "AI Working" (feasibility_study) not
"Fix Ready" since Copilot is still working on them.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
